reviews.review_description: One of best shooters, full adjust as grabbing and height set - it's really comfortable to play. You can choose between manual and auto-reload so it's really for evryone. It's a poly style but gameplay is really good. It's only a demo so contain only one mission but overall I think is really a shy shiny gem of Meta.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, we really appreciate it! 😄

We’re glad you’re enjoying the game and that it feels comfortable to play — that means a lot to us!

If you’d like to stay up to date, feel free to join our Discord 👉 www.dohvr.com/discord/👀

reviews.review_title: Good but I would like it to be free
reviews.review_description: So the demos good but. I would like both to be free but that will probably not happen or at least lower the price. But over all both demos are good and if they made it free. I would get both.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! 😄

We understand that everyone would love games to be free, but game development takes a lot of time and resources.

The good news is that both of our games regularly go on sale, and right now they're available with a 30% discount 👀

If you enjoyed the demo, this is probably a great time to jump into the full version 😉

reviews.review_title: Amazing game! But I have a suggestion
reviews.review_description: I have a suggestion for an upcoming days of heros game. Now I know your past two games have been about WW2  and have guns and all that 🔫. But what about a game about maybe the battle of Cannea or Zama with swords and spears and shields. ( and mmmaaaayyybe elephants?)  But all that aside I love your games they're really cool and I like the slo-mo when you use the scope with the sniper thing ( I forgot the name) I love history and your games are making me love it more.

developer_response.body:
It’s really great to hear that our games are helping you enjoy history even more—that means a lot to us!

Your ideas sound awesome, but right now we’re fully focused on the D-Day update, so if you’ve played it already, there’ll soon be a great reason to come back :)

Thanks a lot for the kind words and support!

reviews.review_description: this is like ww2 and its good and i want the full version but it costs $15.99 which is 16 dollars i want it but my mom and dad will say no tho

developer_response.body:
Thank you! 😄

Good news — there should be a discount available in a few days, so you'll be able to get it for a lower price

reviews.review_description: I JUST played the demo, and Holy, i love it already. Im a HUGE WW2 fan and to have a game THIS GOOD is MAGIC. I cant Wait to see any new updates/DLC's

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing feedback — we really appreciate it! 🙌

Glad you’re enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun and i felt i was in a war

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 😄🙌

We're really happy to hear the game made you feel like you were truly in the middle of the war — that's exactly the kind of immersion we wanted to create.

Thanks for the 5/5 review🫡

reviews.review_description: Very good but please put a crouch button in the game please and getting guns out of my inventory was a pain but overall great game￼

developer_response.body:
Glad you’re enjoying the game 😄

Good news — both of those things are already in!
Press the menu button on your left controller to customize your equipment layout so it’s more comfortable, and you can also enable the crouch option there 👍

reviews.review_description: It’s only the sample I would probably rate this one and a half stars, but I could only choose one or two

developer_response.body:
Well, name of game include "Demo", so it's probably a demo. It's absolutely unfair and harmful to rate it a 1 because it's a demo and as a reason saying that it is a demo.

Tell us something about the mechanics that you found uncomfortable and that you think we can improve - this is a feedback

 We also invite you to our Discord page at http://dohvr.com/discord

reviews.review_description: Even though it's a double virgin I like it

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for the positive feedback — really glad you’re enjoying it! 🙌

reviews.review_description: It's cool I love war stuff this is my favorite game I can't wait to buy the full version and dday

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We really appreciate it and we’re glad you’re enjoying the game. You’re definitely welcome to check out the full versions. Also, the D-Day game will be getting a major update soon, so it’s going to be even better 😉

reviews.review_title: We need a little bit more!
reviews.review_description:
This is a great game! I don’t have enough money to buy the full version but please add more to the demo! We get to play the USSR but the only combat is in the tutorial. And since we can play the Germans (only in full version) that would give the player what it feels like on both sides! On the d day demo we get a tutorial AND
A mission! 

These are just recommendations but please add them because not would it only make the demos fun but very one can have a fun time. 

Thank you for your time: Warshows

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback! 😊

The demo was designed to give players a taste of the atmosphere, gameplay, and story of the full game. In our opinion, it already offers a solid introduction to what the full experience has to offer.

The rest of the content, missions, and campaigns are available in the full version, which is where the complete experience begins. Thanks for giving the demo a try! 👍

cool game

reviews.review_description: if you're new to shooting this is a perfect game and i love war so this gets a five out of five

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5/5 rating and your support! 🙌

reviews.review_description: I think this game is really good the reloading feels nice the guns are alright and I am excited to get the full version and maybe even for the future I suggest maybe make a world war 1 based game like this which could include raiding enemy trenches,fighting at night while a flare illuminates the battle field,man artillery,etc I think this is a good game idea.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the positive feedback!

And yes — a World War 1 themed game is definitely in our plans 😉

Thanks a lot for the great suggestion and for supporting our game!

reviews.review_description: Rip off of cod 2 with cartoon graphics that oddly favors the German side

developer_response.body:
The demo only lets you play as the Soviets. In the full version, you can play both Soviets and Germans.
Claiming the game favors or glorifies Germany when the demo doesn’t even allow you to play as them is simply incorrect. This review seems disconnected from what the game actually contains

reviews.review_title: Can i get full game for free
reviews.review_description: please

developer_response.body:
We’re really happy to hear that you like the game! 😊
Unfortunately, we can’t give out the full game for free.

But we do have some good news — we have another Days of Heroes title that you can try for free. You can play Days of Heroes: D-Day (Demo), which lets you jump into the experience at no cost. It’s a bit older, but we’re currently working on a big update for it as well.

Hope you enjoy it, and thanks for checking out our games! 🙌

reviews.review_description: Played the dday one too and it is the best. Next game should be ww1 pls

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we’re really glad you enjoyed it! And yes, we do have a World War I themed game planned for the future 🙂

reviews.review_description: Ggg

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive rating!

reviews.review_title: i wanna try out the full game
reviews.review_description: The demo one is fun but is just that we could do one campaign that's why i wanna try the full campaign pls

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words about the demo, we’re really glad you enjoyed it! 🙌
The demo is meant to give a small taste of the experience, but the full game includes the complete campaign, more missions, and much more content overall.

We truly encourage you to try the full version if you enjoyed the demo — we think you’ll have a great time with the complete experience. Thanks again for your support! 💙

reviews.review_description:
this is a game by a company that i already loved enough and now the even better game i only have the demo but it's so good they already improved a bunch from d day and just to see a grow 

 makes me happy and if the owners actually listen to this i love you guys and keep going you make the best games

developer_response.body:
We definitely see every comment, and messages like yours give us the energy and motivation to keep going! 💪
Thank you so much for such overwhelmingly positive feedback — it really means the world to us. 🙏❤️

reviews.review_title: wow has this series just got better!
reviews.review_description: this is one of the most fun demos I've played in a while. though i have not got the full game yet, this is crazy good for free.its so much better than doh dday, and dday was really good. PS to the developers...   I'd love to see a veitnam war game like this one, and days of hereos D-Day. real quick, how long do u think it will be when the 3rd game come out?

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words! We're thrilled you enjoyed the demo — that means a lot to us.
Vietnam would definitely be an exciting setting... and while nothing’s confirmed yet, if you check the credits closely, you might spot a little hint about where the series could go next 😉

reviews.review_description: I love the guns

Thank you! 
We spent a lot of time making sure the weapons feel just right in VR — so it’s awesome to hear you’re enjoying them!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games EVER!

Also you should do a ww1 trench combat game, that would be very, very, very FUUUUNNN

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for such a positive comment — it really means a lot! 
We’re currently working on the big D-Day update, and we’d love to keep the series going. Hopefully we’ll have the chance to make that happen!
